notes: SHIP v1.14.288 - B-03 ghost position polish (refines B-02). #pg-cmd .ghosthero position-only tweak: right 6->18px (off the edge, into the right-side gap) + bottom 84->100px (small lift; base clears the SCAN/LOG/BLOCKER verb row by ~20px, up from B-02's ~6px). NO change to width (104), z-index (-1), opacity, or pointer-events - B-02 got those right. Verb-row vertical clearance is width-independent (verb top is ~80px above lens bottom at any width) so there is no verb overlap at 360px or narrower; z-index:-1 keeps the ghost behind all hero content so any headline/subtext graze reads correctly. Exact position values are Claude's judgment - the B03-GHOST-POSITION.md handoff was not provided; owner device-verify tunes the final look. Redesign-only (#pg-cmd), legacy byte-identical. Three-stamp .287->.288. DEVICE-VERIFY (John, iPhone @390 and 360): ghost sits upper-right, clear of the verb row, reads as ambient art; SCAN / LOG / BLOCKER unobstructed.
